ssml_fingerprint.note: SSML body redacted — contained the rendered Hebrew utterance text. The ssml_sha256 below is authoritative; anyone with the codebase can regenerate the literal SSML by re-running the spike (see PR #98 reproducer).

SSML body redacted — contained the rendered Hebrew utterance text. The ssml_sha256 below is authoritative; anyone with the codebase can regenerate the literal SSML by re-running the spike (see PR #98 reproducer).

evidence: Two distinct SSML strings (one wraps prosody with <mstts:express-as style="fearful">, one does not; different SHA-256) hash to two distinct cache keys, both populated by real Azure he-IL-HilaNeural synthesis.  Their cached audio bytes are byte-identical → Azure's he-IL voice silently ignores the express-as wrapper for this voice and prosody combination.
